metadata.title: Cross-domain SOC validation dataset (v1, 2026-05-13)
metadata.description:
Cross-domain validation of self-organized criticality (SOC) and adjacent universality classes. Companion dataset for the structural-isomorphism preprint series (arXiv ID TBD).

Contents:

  • 13 verified universality systems: SOC × 9 (sandpile, earthquakes, neural avalanches, forest fires, solar flares, financial avalanches, traffic, granular, snow); PA × 2 (preferential attachment networks); Hysteresis × 1 (random-field Ising); Scheffer × 1 (early-warning regime shift).
  • 4 null-control systems (exponential, gaussian, uniform, gamma) to validate rejection rates.
  • B1 ⊗ B3 taxonomy verdicts (21 classes) with per-system pass/fail breakdown.
  • Frozen analysis pipeline: Clauset 2009 KS-fit + parametric bootstrap (n=1000) + Vuong likelihood-ratio + universal scaling collapse.
  • Reproducibility scripts (Python 3.10+) and unit tests.

Methods: See companion preprint at arXiv:TBD (to be cross-referenced once published).

Software: Analysis pipeline is published as soc-pipeline on PyPI (https://pypi.org/project/soc-pipeline/). LLM ensemble guardrails published as guarded-llm.
metadata.notes: First public release. v2 will add Phase 2 extensions (additional null controls + reject-aware pipeline). See CHANGELOG in companion GitHub repo.
